APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ECKERT, DELBERT DANIEL ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

JUDGE CHOPPELAS, BEA CHAPMAN REPORTER. 3:55 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, DEFTS IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED AND TERM OF STIPULATION READ INTO RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 55 BEIDEMAN PLACE, SF, CA AS TO THE 3 DEFTS WALTON, ECKERT AND HAWKINS. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT STAYED TO 7-5-94 AT 5:00PM, PLTF WILL PAY MR WALTON ONLY THE SUM OF $200. MOVING EXPENSE EACH SIDE RESERVES THEIR CLAIMS AGAINST EACH OTHER, NO STAYS AND ANY PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND BECOMES THE PROPERTY OF PLTF. IF DEFTS VACATE ON OR BEFORE 7-5-94, PLTF ATTY WILL EXECUTE A STIPULATION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS CASE.
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT WALTON, MANCH HAWKINS, EARL JAMES HEARING SET FOR MAY-17-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
